description_long: This is a vibrantly decorated ceramic teapot with a bulbous body and a short, slightly upward-angled spout. The exterior is adorned with intricate floral patterns in shades of pink, yellow, green, and blue, set against a bright blue background. The handle is thick, rounded, and attached at the upper and lower portions of the body, painted in a deep blue with visible textural details. The teapot lacks a lid, revealing a white glazed interior. The base is flat, allowing it to sit securely on surfaces, and the overall craftsmanship suggests a hand-painted, ornamental style. The teapot is displayed on a wooden platform, highlighting its decorative appeal.
description: A colorful, floral-patterned ceramic teapot with a blue handle and no lid, featuring a rounded body and upward-angled spout. The surface is richly detailed and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view shows the spout, floral patterns, and the rounded body with the handle partially visible on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the continuous floral design and the absence of the spout, with the handle just visible at the back.
description_view_2: Angled rear view displays the handle more prominently and the spout in profile, with floral motifs wrapping around.
description_view_3: Back view focuses on the handle's full structure and attachment points, with the spout hidden and floral patterns continuing.
attribute_spout_orientation: Short, slightly upward-angled spout positioned at the front of the body.
attribute_handle_design: Thick, rounded loop handle attached at the upper and lower sides of the body, painted deep blue with visible texture.
attribute_decorative_patterns: Floral motifs in pink, yellow, and green on a blue background, covering the entire exterior.
